subcodes.first_line: O beloved! The Sun of Truth is shining bright, the spring clouds are outpouring their bounty, and the divine breezes of springtime are wafting from every direction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حبیبا شمس حقیقت تابان و ابر بهاری در فیضان و اریاح بهار الهی از کل جهات در
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
